description_long: This is a medium-sized, green apple with a smooth, slightly glossy skin and a subtle yellowish undertone. The apple is nearly spherical but has a gentle taper toward the base, and a shallow dimple at the top where a short, brown stem emerges. A single, broad green leaf with visible veins is attached to the stem, adding a naturalistic touch. The surface of the apple is mostly unblemished, with a few faint speckles and a healthy, fresh appearance. The coloration and shape suggest a crisp, tart variety, commonly found in grocery stores and urban markets. The apple's overall look is fresh and inviting, suitable for display or consumption.
description: A smooth, green apple with a brown stem and a single green leaf. The skin is glossy and unblemished, giving a fresh, crisp appearance.
description_view_0: Green apple with stem and leaf clearly visible on the left side.
description_view_1: Apple viewed from the opposite side, stem prominent, leaf mostly hidden.
description_view_2: Front view with stem upright and leaf extending to the right.
description_view_3: Apple with leaf partially covering the top, stem visible.
